body.notes: Participation in IETF meetings constitutes agreement to the Note Well, which permits recording, transcription, and public archival of proceedings. See also BCP 78 (RFC 5378) and BCP 79 (RFC 8179) for IPR policies.

body.title: Multihoming Deployment Considerations for DDoS Open Threat Signaling (DOTS)
Distributed Denial-of-Service Open Threat Signaling (DOTS) Signal Channel Call Home
Use Cases for DDoS Open Threat Signaling (DOTS) Telemetry
Distributed Denial-of-Service Open Threat Signaling (DOTS) Signal Channel Configuration Attributes for Robust Block Transmission
